reviews.comment:
Impecable la atención del fullshop y el menú que ofrecen para comer al paso. Muy tranquilo el salón y destacar la limpieza y orden

(Translated by Google)
The service at the full shop was impeccable, and the menu they offer for quick meals was great. The dining area was very quiet, and the cleanliness and order were noteworthy.
